models.hero: Full-screen hero content with site name, tagline, and description.
models.projectCard: A project showcased in the horizontal scrolling carousel, each with an associated award.
models.missionValue: A core company value displayed in the mission section.
models.impactStat: A key environmental or business metric with a number, label, and description.
models.expansion: Future growth initiative with location and technology details.

relationships: Each projectCard embeds its award inline (one award per project in this view).
impactStat and missionValue are standalone display entities with no cross-relationships.

hero.description: Philippine environmental infrastructure — restoring coastal ecosystems through nature-mimicking technology and public-private partnerships.

projectCards.name: Puerto Princesa Water Reclamation & Learning Center
projectCards.description: The Philippines' first large-scale combined septage and sewage treatment facility, preventing 4,000 cubic meters of untreated wastewater from entering the bay daily.

award.title: Water Quality Improvement Project of the Year

projectCards.name: Gingoog City Sanitation & Treatment Facility
projectCards.description: Bringing the Puerto Princesa model to Mindanao — a modular treatment facility tailored to a growing coastal city's needs, contributing to the city earning its Seal of Good Local Governance.

award.title: Seal of Good Local Governance
award.organization: Department of the Interior and Local Government

projectCards.name: Del Carmen Integrated Environmental Facility
projectCards.location: Del Carmen, Siargao Island, Surigao del Norte
projectCards.description: A next-generation facility combining wastewater treatment with solid waste management via pyrolysis technology — designed to handle tourism-driven waste while protecting Siargao's world-famous ecosystems.

missionValues.title: Serbisyo, Hindi Negosyo
missionValues.description: Service, not business. We temper profitability to keep environmental services affordable for every community — because pollution doesn't discriminate between urban centers and remote barangays.

missionValues.title: Full Transparency
missionValues.description: Complete transparency in every engagement. Our projects run with real-time monitoring data available to partners, government units, and the public.

missionValues.title: Integrity in Every Project
missionValues.description: Every facility we build is delivered on time, on scope, and with measurable environmental outcomes. Our track record speaks through restored ecosystems and communities that thrive.

missionValues.title: Environmental Stewardship
missionValues.description: Our machines enhance natural treatment processes instead of replacing them — lower power use, fewer chemicals, and less impact. We work with nature, not against it.

impactStats.label: Wastewater treated daily
impactStats.description: Kept out of Puerto Princesa Bay every single day since 2022

impactStats.label: Active project sites
impactStats.description: Across Palawan, Mindanao, and Siargao Island

impactStats.label: Asian Water Award
impactStats.description: Water Quality Improvement Project of the Year 2025

impactStats.label: International events restored
impactStats.description: Ironman and Dragon Boat races returned to Puerto Princesa Bay

expansion.title: Expanding Our Reach
expansion.subtitle: From water to land — building the next generation of Philippine environmental infrastructure

initiatives.title: Pyrolysis — Waste to Fuel
initiatives.description: Introducing solid waste management through pyrolysis technology that converts non-recyclable waste into usable fuel. Combined with our wastewater treatment, this creates the first fully integrated environmental facility for a Philippine island tourism destination.

initiatives.title: Provincial-Scale Waste Management
initiatives.description: The Cebu Provincial Government is studying the Siargao model as a template for solving Cebu's solid waste crisis — validating JCA 1221's approach as the blueprint for island-based environmental infrastructure across the Philippines.
